audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. All block processing paths (gossip and full) invoke process_execution_payload_for_gossip which enforces in_block <= maximum where maximum = get_blob_schedule_entry(get_current_epoch(state)).max_blobs_per_block and in_block = body.blob_kzg_commitments.len(). Since state.slot == block.slot (verified by debug_assert), the epoch calculation is correct and the limit is properly enforced.
